metadata.name: Respond to RFP for Professional Services

description: A large potential customer has issued a Request for Proposal (RFP) for a complex implementation project.

nodes.task_description: Review the RFP document to understand the customer's requirements, scope, and evaluation criteria.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant has a full understanding of the customer's needs.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the total hours and resources required to deliver the project as described in the RFP.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant creates a detailed effort estimate.

nodes.task_description: Write a formal proposal document, including the project plan, timeline, team roles, and pricing, and submit it to the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Consultant submits a high-quality, comprehensive RFP response.
